title: ammi majus var. intermedium
intro: Ammi majus var. intermedium, also known as False Queen Anne's Lace, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Ammi majus var. intermedium include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, relieve symptoms of menopause, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
